figures.caption: Figure 4: Failure cases in Im2GPS3k (geodesic distance > 2500 km from ground truth). (a) Query image with matched link image. (b–c) Query images without reliable matches, including human-centered scenes or generic content (e.g., natural scenery or everyday objects).
Figure 3: Filtering hyperparameter analysis on MP16-Search.

Table 1: Main results on Im2GPS3k and YFCC4k. “+” denotes integration of GeoSearchwith baselinemodels at the filtering stage to select between GeoSearch and baseline output. † denotes models using OSV-5M for retrieval. Best results are in bold, and second-best are underlined.
Figure 1: Overview of the GeoSearch framework.
